# BuzingBee

> BuzingBee is a digital marketing and AI services agency.

## Primary Services
- AI SEO and LLM SEO
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
- Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)
- SEO and content strategy
- Google Ads and Meta Ads
- Web development and mobile app development
- AI automation and chatbot integration

## Important URLs
- Home: https://buzingbee.com/
- Services: https://buzingbee.com/services
- About: https://buzingbee.com/about
- Pricing: https://buzingbee.com/pricing
- Startup Plans: https://buzingbee.com/startup
- Portfolio: https://buzingbee.com/portfolio
- Blog: https://buzingbee.com/blog
- Contact: https://buzingbee.com/contact
